dialogue: Today is a beautiful day.
Time for a field trip!
Welcome kids! Are you ready for the field trip?
We will have a lot of time for learning.
Time to get started!
Good answers!
Let's move on to the next few questions...
Isn't learning fun?
There is much to discover here.
That's right!
You're a quick learner, aren't you?
I love going outside and learn more about our world.
Now, show me what you have seen!
We are making good progress here!
Biology is my favourite topic.
It teaches you about plants and animals!
What is your favourite topic at school?
Bravo!
The field trip is almost over, only a few questions left!
You know a lot of things, don't you!
This field trip was fun!
Let's see if you remember everything we learned about.
These questions won't be as easy.
You did it!
Maybe the questions were too easy?
No, you are really good, that's it!
Thank you for joining me on this road trip. I hope you had fun!
